description: Blueprint of core computational logic and algorithms executed across the platform

ProfitDistribution.description: Daily cron algorithm that distributes yields to active deposits
rules: Checks plan limits and capping logic
Calculates daily return percentage based on active Risk Category bounds
Applies Logic Builder variable coefficients (Base Skew, Volatility Factor, Min Floor)
Applies compound bonuses and stacking multiplier rates
Distributes rewards and updates user wallet balances

AllianceGrowthNetworkPairing.description: Level-by-level pair matching, volume carry-forwards, and commission payout logic
rules: Validates sponsor left and right directs requirements
Executes ratio matching (100:100, 100:200, 200:100) per pairing tier
Deducts matched volumes from Left/Right legs recursively
Applies carry-forward values and caps pairing cycles according to plan settings
Updates user stats and triggers payouts

StakingYields.description: Calculates additional yields for staked deposits and enforces early withdrawal penalties
rules: Validates if deposit.isStaked is true and stakedUntil has not passed
Adds deposit.stakingBonusRate directly to the calculated base daily profit rate
Restricts capital withdrawal before maturity date or charges penalty percentage

VariableRotation.description: Oscillates simulator variables dynamically in real-time to mimic active markets
rules: Fetches live variable coefficients from Logic Builder configurations
Fluctuates win rates, volatility spreads, and candle spreads randomly by +/- 5% per cycle
Injects noise into simulated trading signals and updates chart candle states
